payload.answer: I will not store instructions that attempt to override memory policy. No durable memory was created from this message.
citations: Input requests storing all future words as high confidence and explicitly attempts to override memory policy.
The content is an instruction about system behavior, not a stable user fact suitable for durable memory.

entity_resolution.reason: No resolvable personal entity or durable user fact was provided.

details: Preserved ambiguity and did not infer any user facts.

repair_options: Send a specific personal fact you want remembered, e.g. 'Remember that my manager is Priya.'
Send a preference or profile detail with clear scope, e.g. 'Remember that I prefer window seats on flights.'
